title: Trump issues expletive-laden threat to Iran over Hormuz Strait blockage
description: The US president says he will destroy Iranian power plants and bridges if the vital waterway is not reopened.

title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

title: Trump declares victory after rescue but threats to US operation in Iran still loom
description: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.

title: Hungary alleges plot to blow up gas pipeline ahead of election
description: The incident comes a week before the polls, and follow warnings of a potential operations staged to influence voters.

title: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
